description: Definition of file ownership between Hub (Mother) and Spoke (Client) repositories.

rules.description: Core business logic and domain entities are managed by the Hub.
Base infrastructure (CDK/SST constructs) is Hub-owned for security and consistency.
The admin dashboard is Hub-owned, but spokes can add client-specific charts/widgets.
Dependencies must be merged; Hub pushes updates but Spoke can add new packages.
Infrastructure definitions are shared; Spokes can extend the stacks.
Client documentation is customized by the spoke.
Utility scripts and lifecycle tools are Hub-owned.
